ignored_warnings.note: FileAccess Weak — app/controllers/api/v1/assets_controller.rb:185. The original_filename is sanitised with File.basename + gsub(/[^\w.\-]/, '_') and the path is scoped under tmp/uploads/<uuid>_v1_<safe_name>. Accepted risk.

FileAccess Weak — app/controllers/api/v1/assets_controller.rb:745. storage_path is a DB-stored value but is resolved through File.expand_path and validated against the tmp/ root before use. Path traversal is not possible. Accepted risk.

SendFile Weak — app/controllers/api/v1/assets_controller.rb:783. Both dam_candidate and tmp_candidate are validated via File.expand_path against storage_root/tmp_root before reaching send_file. Content-Type is from DB, not user input. Accepted risk.

PermitAttributes Medium — admin/users_controller.rb:368. user_group_ids is an intentional many-to-many assignment for group membership management in the admin panel. The :admin key is handled explicitly outside user_params with role/ownership guards.
